posts.text:
Ladies and gentlemen… it’s the 7PM hour of Straight Shooter on @SiriusXM, and we still have a lot to talk about!

Tonight's Topics: 
War with Iran surges U.S gas prices
Government shutdown causes chaos at airports
Inflation steady but pockets empty
And Midterm “Blue Wave” drowning GOP

I am here until 8:00PM EST, ready to take your call (📞 866-967-6887)!
